relationships: tok:ona li ko e kiwen walo tawa moku ni﹕ ona li tan ma Italija li jo e lipu pan mute e kili loje e ko soweli
tok:nena mi pi sinpin lawa li pana e telo sijelo loje lon tenpo suno ni
tok:soweli loje lili li weka tan oko lon insa pi palisa kasi
tok:mi lukin e ni﹕ sinpin lawa pi jan Ton li kama loje
tok:jan Ton li kama pana e telo sijelo loje tan poki kon
tok:telo li kama tan kili pi loje jelo lon tenpo poka la ona li pona mute tawa uta
tok:kili suli jelo loje li kepeken tan seme lon tenpo suno musi pi jan moli﹖
tok:telo li kama tan kili pi loje jelo lon tenpo poka la ona li suwi mute
